twitter_thread: 87% of passive income investors lose money due to poor diversification, with 40% holding only 1-2 assets.
A $10,000 investment in Realty Income REIT yielded 5% annual returns, but a 20% sector downturn wiped out gains.
Allocate 30% to dividend stocks like Coca-Cola and 20% to bonds like 10-year Treasuries.
Vanguard's VTSAX ETF charges just 0.04% in fees, vs 1.5% for actively managed funds.
Limit sector exposure: no more than 10% in tech, 5% in energy, to avoid sector-specific downturns.
Rebalancing quarterly can save 2-3% in potential losses from market shifts.
What's the most effective passive income strategy you've implemented in your portfolio? #passiveincome #investing
